## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Sunbit and GrowthX to discuss content production, publishing, and new AI-focused initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/PETGrZLKhNWCqz8EniztGe92HjKYNdiR?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production progressing well; publishing workflow being streamlined with API integration](https://fathom.video/share/PETGrZLKhNWCqz8EniztGe92HjKYNdiR?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)
  - [New AI-focused content initiative launching for Sunbit, targeting investors, analysts, media, and engineering talent](https://fathom.video/share/PETGrZLKhNWCqz8EniztGe92HjKYNdiR?tab=summary&timestamp=1053.0)
  - [Social post content generation in progress; iterating based on feedback](https://fathom.video/share/PETGrZLKhNWCqz8EniztGe92HjKYNdiR?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Publishing

  - [Another batch of content ready for review](https://fathom.video/share/PETGrZLKhNWCqz8EniztGe92HjKYNdiR?tab=summary&timestamp=367.0)
  - [Publishing workflow being improved:](https://fathom.video/share/PETGrZLKhNWCqz8EniztGe92HjKYNdiR?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
      - [API integration in progress to automate WordPress posting](https://fathom.video/share/PETGrZLKhNWCqz8EniztGe92HjKYNdiR?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
      - [Need to clarify if both API key and login credentials are required](https://fathom.video/share/PETGrZLKhNWCqz8EniztGe92HjKYNdiR?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
      - [Jason to work on WordPress connection and provide public URL for posting](https://fathom.video/share/PETGrZLKhNWCqz8EniztGe92HjKYNdiR?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
  - [Angel started publishing content this week](https://fathom.video/share/PETGrZLKhNWCqz8EniztGe92HjKYNdiR?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
  - [Request to include keywords, slug, and additional elements (summary, bullet points) in Google Docs for easier publishing](https://fathom.video/share/PETGrZLKhNWCqz8EniztGe92HjKYNdiR?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)

### Social Media Content

  - [Engineering team made suggested changes](https://fathom.video/share/PETGrZLKhNWCqz8EniztGe92HjKYNdiR?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
  - [Plan to generate social posts for 5 published articles as a test batch](https://fathom.video/share/PETGrZLKhNWCqz8EniztGe92HjKYNdiR?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)
  - [Will evaluate and iterate based on feedback](https://fathom.video/share/PETGrZLKhNWCqz8EniztGe92HjKYNdiR?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)

### New AI-Focused Content Initiative

  - [Timeline: New property to be launched by end of October](https://fathom.video/share/PETGrZLKhNWCqz8EniztGe92HjKYNdiR?tab=summary&timestamp=1053.0)
  - [Platform: Considering Webflow instead of WordPress](https://fathom.video/share/PETGrZLKhNWCqz8EniztGe92HjKYNdiR?tab=summary&timestamp=1061.0)
  - [Content focus:](https://fathom.video/share/PETGrZLKhNWCqz8EniztGe92HjKYNdiR?tab=summary&timestamp=1071.0)
      - [Seven dimensions of AI in fintech](https://fathom.video/share/PETGrZLKhNWCqz8EniztGe92HjKYNdiR?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)
      - [Technical topics (e.g., convolutional neural networks, fraud detection)](https://fathom.video/share/PETGrZLKhNWCqz8EniztGe92HjKYNdiR?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)
      - [AI glossary and industry trends](https://fathom.video/share/PETGrZLKhNWCqz8EniztGe92HjKYNdiR?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
  - [Target audience: Investors, analysts, media, and engineering talent](https://fathom.video/share/PETGrZLKhNWCqz8EniztGe92HjKYNdiR?tab=summary&timestamp=1378.0)
  - [Purpose: Establish Sunbit as an AI thought leader in fintech](https://fathom.video/share/PETGrZLKhNWCqz8EniztGe92HjKYNdiR?tab=summary&timestamp=1467.0)
  - [Inspiration: Upstart's AI documentation and certification course](https://fathom.video/share/PETGrZLKhNWCqz8EniztGe92HjKYNdiR?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)

### Content Strategy for AI Initiative

  - [Broad approach from basic "What is AI?" to Sunbit-specific applications](https://fathom.video/share/PETGrZLKhNWCqz8EniztGe92HjKYNdiR?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)
  - [Aim to create a comprehensive resource similar to C3's machine learning guide](https://fathom.video/share/PETGrZLKhNWCqz8EniztGe92HjKYNdiR?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)
  - [Planning a clean, simple design with interconnected content structure](https://fathom.video/share/PETGrZLKhNWCqz8EniztGe92HjKYNdiR?tab=summary&timestamp=1658.0)
